description: Live GitHub + WakaTime activity over the last 7 days.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu logged 14 hrs 23 mins of coding time, averaging 2 hrs 48 mins per day across 5 projects. His work was mostly in Other (42%) and Java (30%), with additional time in Markdown (13%) and TypeScript (8%). No GitHub commits, pull requests, or new repositories were recorded in the fetched data.
